    Dr. Shuai Wang (Dylan)

    1083 citations · h-index 15 · 02/04/26

    Postdoc, University of Queensland; PhD (2025); Previously: Naver Labs Europe, Leipzig University

    • Brisbane, Australia

    All News

    April 03, 2026

    Three Papers Accepted in SIGIR 2026

    [Reproducibility Paper]: Beyond Chunk-Then-Embed: A Comprehensive Taxonomy and Evaluation of Document Segmentation Strategies for Information Retrieval; [Reproducibility Paper]: The Vulnerability of LLM Rankers to Prompt Injection Attacks; [Short Paper]: Rank-R1: Enhancing Reasoning in LLM-based Document Rerankers via Reinforcement Learning.

    January 20, 2026

    Serving as Communication Chair for SIGIR 2026

    I will be serving as the Communication (Social Media) Chair for SIGIR 2026 conference to be held in Melbourne | Naarm, Australia.

    January 04, 2026

    Paper accepted in EACL2026 Main Conference

    [Full Paper]: AutoBool: Reinforcement-Learned LLM for Effective Automatic Systematic Reviews Boolean Query Generation.

    December 18, 2025

    Two Papers accepted in ECIR2026

    [Full Paper]: Starbucks: Improved Training for 2D Matryoshka Embeddings; [Industrial Track Paper] Evaluator - Rapid, Agile Development and Evaluation of Retrieval Augmented Generation Systems Without Labels

    December 08, 2025

    Reveived SeCAT Score of 4.83 (SD=0.37) for INFS7410

    I have received a SeCAT score of 4.83 out of 5 for INFS7410 Information Retrieval and Web Search that I coordinated and lectured in semester 2, 2025; based on 43 student responses out of 122.

    November 14, 2025

    Conferred PhD Degree

    Successfully completed and defended my PhD thesis on information retrieval and systematic review automation at The University of Queensland, the degree has been conferred; I will attend the graduation ceremony in December 2025.

    October 05, 2025

    SIGIR-AP 2025 Queensland Satellite

    I will be serving as a Queensland Satelite Chair for the SIGIR-AP 2025 Queensland Satellite Event.

    August 01, 2025

    Started Teaching Role at The University of Queensland

    At semester 2, 2025, I will begin as a lecturer and course coordinator for the course INFS7410 Information Retrieval and Web Search at The University of Queensland.

    April 05, 2025

    Three Papers Accepted in SIGIR 2025

    [Reproducibility Paper]: 2D Matryoshka Training for Information Retrieval; Reassessing Large Language Model Boolean Query Generation for Systematic Reviews; Pre-training vs. Fine-tuning: A Reproducibility Study on Dense Retrieval Knowledge Acquisition.

    February 01, 2025

    Started Postdoc at The University of Queensland

    Started a postdoc position in information retrieval and natural language processing at The University of Queensland.

    January 20, 2025

    Paper Accepted in WWW 2025

    [Short Paper]: ReSLLM: Large Language Models are Strong Resource Selectors for Federated Search

    December 20, 2024

    Present Encore-paper at SIGIR-AP, Melbourne Satelite

    Encore Presentation: Training Adaptive BERT-based Dense Retrievers at Smaller Scales: Matryoshka, 2D Matryoshka, and Starbucks Approaches

    December 18, 2024

    Two Papers Accepted in ECIR 2025

    [Full Paper]: Corpus Subsampling; [Full Paper]: Prompt Variations on Zero-shot LLM-based Rankers

    October 24, 2024

    Paper Accepted in WSDM 2025

    [Full Paper]: Context Embeddings for Efficient Answer Generation in RAG

    July 25, 2024

    Paper Presentation at SIGIR, Washington DC

    Presented papers accepted at SIGIR 2024 in Washington DC.

    March 26, 2024

    Three papers Accepted in SIGIR2024

    [Resource Paper]: FeB4RAG; [Short Paper]: LLM for stemming; [Perspective Paper]: Evaluating ad-hoc generative IR;

    March 25, 2024

    Paper Presentation at ECIR, Glasgow

    Presented a paper Zero-shot Zero-shot Generative Large Language Models for Systematic Review Screening Automation.

    February 29, 2024

    Internship at Naver Labs Europe

    From 29th of Feb, 2024, I will start my internship at Naver Labs Europe in Grenoble for 4 months, investigating on Large Language Models

    December 19, 2023

    One Full Paper (Findings) Accepted in ECIR2024

    [Full Paper]: Zero-shot Generative Large Language Models for Systematic Review Screening Automation has been accepted to ECIR 2024.

    November 28, 2023

    Present Paper at SIGIR-AP, Melbourne Satelite

    Presented a paper LLM-driven Boolean-based screening prioritisation at SIGIR-AP 2023.

    July 22, 2023

    Presentations at SIGIR 2023

    Due to my entry permit to Taiwan got rejected, my supervisor Professor Guido Zuccon will present our two papers instead at the SIGIR 2023 conference in person.

    May 05, 2023

    SIGIR 2023 Student Travel Grant

    I am grateful to SIGIR for awarding me a student travel grant of USD 1125 and a complimentary conference registration to attend the SIGIR 2023 conference

    April 01, 2023

    Two Papers Accepted at SIGIR 2023

    [Full Paper]: Can ChatGPT Write a Good Boolean Query for Systematic Review Literature Search?; and [Reproducibility Paper]: Balanced Topic Aware Sampling for Effective Dense Retriever: A Reproducibility Study have been accepted to SIGIR 2023.

    Read more
    March 04, 2023

    Research Visit at Leipzig University

    Visiting Leipzig University for two months to collaborate on research projects related to systematic review automation and complex medicine-based question-answering.

    Read more
    February 27, 2023

    Poster Presentations at WSDM 2023, Singapore

    Presented a demo poster on MeSH Term suggestion at the WSDM 2023 conference in Singapore.

    Read more
    December 15, 2022

    Presentations at ADCS 2022, Adelaide, Australia

    Presented a paper on using neural ranker in systematic review screening at the ADCS 2022 conference in Adelaide, Australia.

    Read more
    July 11, 2022

    Poster Presentations at SIGIR 2022, Madrid, Spain

    Presented two posters at the SIGIR 2022 conference in Madrid, Spain.

    Read more
    April 10, 2022

    Present Paper at ECIR 2022, Online

    Presented a paper on reproducibility of Seed-driven document ranking in systematic review at the ECIR 2022 conference.

    Read more
    December 09, 2021

    Present Paper at ADCS 2021, Online, Received Best Student Paper Award

    Presented r on MeSH Term suggestion and received the Best Student Paper Award.

    Read more
    October 01, 2021

    Started PhD program at The University of Queensland

    Began a PhD program in information retrieval and natural language processing at The University of Queensland.

    July 11, 2021

    Present Paper at ICTIR 2021, Online

    Presented a paper online interpolation of DR and BM25 at the ICTIR 2021 conference.

    Dr. Shuai Wang (Dylan)

    Postdoctoral Researcher

    University of Queensland

    Brisbane, Australia
